silver.label: Decoded events · transfers
silver._provenance: missing · ABI decoding not run on this slice

activeByArchetype._provenance: real · tx ⋈ clusters, then per-minute unique from per archetype

fingerprints._provenance: real · per-archetype mean of scaled features, min-max normalized per axis

anomalyPressure._provenance: derived · z-score of tx volume vs trailing 10-min baseline
